name: Sots Saad
testimonial:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Melody stole the show at my niece’s birthday party! Her warm, friendly personality instantly won over the kids, and her incredible talent kept them captivated. Her technique was both seamless and efficient, making the whole experience smooth and enjoyable. I highly recommend her services for your next special event—your little guests will absolutely love it!

name: Sarah
testimonial: Hey melody! Thank you so much for today! Your work is absolutely incredible, it was seriously impressive to watch you work, you are so talented!! The kids just loved it so much!! I didn’t take many pictures, the life of the organiser 🤪 but you can definitely share the pics of my kiddos! And I will pop a review on your page because I couldn’t recommend you enough!! The elephant still makes me laugh, the little boy is my nephew and my mum told me about you having to paint it on the fly 🤣

name: Krystal
testimonial:
Thank you sooooo much!!! You're amazing!!

The kids faces all looked sooo amazing 🥰

name: Donna
testimonial: Hi I had so many lovely comments on my arm design you did for me for Valentine's Day. I had a talk with some friends and wanted to check with you if it was ok to take a photo and get it tattooed on my arm as it's your work and I'd like your permission to have it made into a tattoo. Thanks again, its a stunning design and I love it.

name: Rebecca
testimonial:
Hi Mel
You were awesome and a huge hit with the kids, thank you! ❤️

name: Annemieke
testimonial: Thanks so much Mell, the kids were so excited and they all looked amazing!

name: Juanita
testimonial: Thanks so much for painting my daughter's face yesterday! She was devastated to wash it off 🙈

name: Renee
testimonial: Thank you again for today. Your face painting was 👌🏼

name: Brooke
testimonial:
Hi Mel,
Thank you for such an amazing day! The kids loved the face painting, and I think the adults did too haha. You were such a great part of our party and we are so thankful that you were there. It was such a success. Thanks again :) Brooke.

name: Paton
testimonial: 😊 we loved having you at our party! And I’ve let me friends know about your services! Thank you so much again!
